---
page-layout: full
toc: false
---
::: {.contact-title}

# Contact

:::

::: {.contact-content}

I welcome inquiries regarding research collaborations, consulting opportunities, policy analysis, and speaking engagements.

📧 **Email:** <a href="mailto:diana.floresperegrina@gmail.com">diana.floresperegrina@gmail.com</a>

Based in the United States and available for research collaborations, consulting projects, and policy engagements.

:::
